name: Democrats.org
subject: To: The Obamas; From: Democrats
body:
Add your name to the First Family's holiday card. **Sign our holiday card for the Obamas!

** **[SIGN THE CARD](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+THE+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc_f&source=em_20161221_dnc_f")**

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28c/4067b0a/22d27b0c7/7e0601af/1512372839/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc_f&source=em_20161221_dnc_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28c/4067b0a/22d27b0c7/7e0601ac/1512372839/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc_f&source=em_20161221_dnc_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28c/4067b0a/22d27b0c7/7e0601ad/1512372839/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc_f&source=em_20161221_dnc_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28c/4067b0a/22d27b0c7/7e0601aa/1512372839/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc_f&source=em_20161221_dnc_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Governor-elect Jim Justice
subject: Cabinet Secretary announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for WV
body:
**Governor-elect Justice Names Jeff Sandy DMAPS Secretary**
**Sandy will bring years of experience to WV Department of Military Affairs and Public Safety **

Today, Governor-elect Jim Justice announced that Jeff Sandy will serve as his secretary of WV Department of Military Affairs and Public Safety (DMAPS). Sandy is a Wood County native and currently a partner in Perry Forensic Investigations LLC, after working 25 years as a Special Agent with U.S. Treasury's Criminal Investigation Division. He is a Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) and a Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist.

In 2008, Sandy was elected Sheriff of Wood County. As Sheriff, Sandy modernized his office with new equipment and new investigative strategies. He was appointed to serve on the Board of the Regional Jail Authority. In 2012, he was elected Chairman of the Regional Jail Board. Sandy also served on the Board of the West Virginia Sheriff's Association. He worked in Iraq on counter terrorism missions and to trace Saddam Hussein's hidden assets to keep them from being used by terrorists. His achievements were featured on ABC's World News Tonight [(view here starting at 1:20:00 mark)](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2100172088772524032/3468196724945061888?v=4o1QLBcucTw). Since 9/11, Sandy has been part of the elite Department of Justice funded SLATT Team (State and Local Anti-Terrorism Training) that has trained over 140,000 United States law enforcement officers in all 50 states and Puerto Rico.

"I want the best and brightest to serve in my administration and Jeff Sandy's experience and qualifications are second to no one," said Governor-elect Jim Justice. "Jeff served our country and the people of Wood County with distinction and I am totally confident that he will continue his extraordinary service to the people of West Virginia. Jeff Sandy is prepared to keep West Virginians safe and make sure our state is ready to handle emergencies."

Jeff Sandy stated, "Governor-elect Justice and his team made it clear that they wanted to appoint someone for DMAPS that had international and domestic public safety experience; and in addition, had experience in private business. When the Governor-elect called me, and asked me to be his Secretary for DMAPS, it was an honor and an opportunity to give back to the state that I love. I assure the people of West Virginia that I will do everything in my power to keep West Virginians safe from foreign and domestic threats to our way of life."

During his time at U.S. Department of Treasury he earned over 100 awards, including: West Virginia Mid-Ohio Valley "Law Enforcement Officer of the Year", U.S. Department of Treasury Employee of the Year, and the second highest medal awarded by the Department of Defense, and the highest award issued by the Department of the Treasury for his investigative work in Iraq concerning the United Nations Oil for Food Fraud, Terrorism Funding, and the tracing of [Saddam Hussein's hidden assets](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2100172088772524032/3540254318982989824?id=129291&page=1&singlePage=true).

Jeff and his wife Renee have 3 children that are graduates of Marshall University. Ben and Matt are Certified Public Accountants, and Brittany is a school teacher specializing in special education.

Paid for by Justice for WV
---
Justice for WV
PO Box 40027
Charleston WV 25364 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2100172088772524032/3396139130907133952).

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Happy Holidays, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Happy Holidays, everyone!
Tom, Ben, Meg, and I are so grateful for you, and we wanted to wish you and your loved ones a safe and happy holiday season.
We hope that you enjoy the holidays with people you love.
With every good wish,
The Hassan family

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd22/2a380d31/14489a89/fecbe7/3143014694/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greitens=20News=20Alerts?=
subject: Eric Greitens Names New Director of Department of Corrections
body:
Peter,
Throughout the campaign, we promised to fight the culture of corruption and politics as usual with a team of reformers and outsiders. Today, I am proud to welcome a new champion to that fight.

Missouri’s Department of Corrections is broken and that puts public safety at risk. Our corrections officers struggle in a culture of harassment and neglect, in a department with low morale and shockingly high turnover. These men and women do important work. They need our help. I’m committed to that mission. That's why I’m honored to announce that Anne Precythe has accepted our offer to serve as the next Director of the Department of Corrections for the State of Missouri.

Anne Precythe, new Department of Corrections Director

Anne is a lifelong corrections employee and leader from North Carolina. She started her career on the front lines, as a probation and parole officer. She grew within her department into leadership roles, and she hired and led a team that changed the culture of corrections. Using data and technology, she made the department leaner and more efficient. After she learned how tough life was for some employees under her charge, she launched a program to support employees who were affected by violence—at work or at home.

Anne is tough on crime and a fierce advocate for the employees and officers who will keep our streets safe. She delivered results in North Carolina. In her state, people released from prison are less likely to commit crimes again. The system is wasting less money. Employees feel heard and appreciated. Because of Anne's leadership, corrections officers are supported, and families know that their state prisons are well-run and secure.

This work isn’t just a career for Anne—it’s a calling. She feels called to serve here in Missouri, and we are grateful that she will be serving alongside our team. We pledged in the campaign to "do different," and with Anne at the helm of the Department of Corrections, that’s what we’re going to do.

Yours In Service,
Eric Greitens

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=86af56a99e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_12_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-86af56a99e-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=86af56a99e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_12_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-86af56a99e-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=86af56a99e) , but please let us know how we can improve.

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: Proud to be a Democrat, Friend? [need your input]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Vote for our official member card design, renew your grassroots support for the fights ahead, and help elect Democrats in 2017 and beyond! [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830b3/1184381391/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161221-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- 2017 is going to be a critical year for our party and we need your input ASAP on our brand new member card designs before voting closes!

Thousands have already weighed in on our options to honor President Obama's legacy, stand up for the values that define us, and show our commitment to electing Democrats. _But time is running out!_

[**Do you have room in your wallet to be a card-carrying Democrat, Friend? Then vote for your favorite member card and renew your support to pre-order the winning design:**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830b3/1184381391/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161221-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830b3/1184381391/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161221-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")
---

We want the official DSCC 2017 member card to be special, Friend. That's why we're giving grassroots Democrats like you the chance to determine what represents our work ahead.

[**So make sure to vote for your favorite DSCC member card and pre-order it with your membership renewal today!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830b3/1184381391/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161221-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")

I'm excited to see what our members pick!

Thanks for your input,
Catherine Algeri
DSCC Director of Marketing

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161221-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830ad/1184381391/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830ac/1184381391/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed45/2b07114c/4167793c/736830af/1184381391/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
clean_body: Vote for our official member card design, renew your grassroots support for the fights ahead, and help elect Democrats in 2017 and beyond! "" Friend -- 2017 is going to be a critical year for our party and we need your input ASAP on our brand new member card designs before voting closes! Thousands have already weighed in on our options to honor President Obama's legacy, stand up for the values that define us, and show our commitment to electing Democrats. But time is running out! "" | "" We want the official DSCC 2017 member card to be special, Friend. That's why we're giving grassroots Democrats like you the chance to determine what represents our work ahead. "" I'm excited to see what our members pick! Thanks for your input, Catherine Algeri DSCC Director of Marketing A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts. Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Democrats.org
subject: ✍ Sign our holiday card for the Obamas!
body:
Add your name to the First Family's holiday card. **Sign our holiday card for the Obamas!

** **[SIGN THE CARD](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+THE+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc2_f&source=em_20161221_dnc2_f")**

"https://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+httpmydemocratsorgSigntheHolidayCard&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc2_f&source=em_20161221_dnc2_f")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28a/4067b0a/22c9391c2/7e0607e4/166291545/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc2_f&source=em_20161221_dnc2_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28a/4067b0a/22c9391c2/7e0607e5/166291545/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc2_f&source=em_20161221_dnc2_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28a/4067b0a/22c9391c2/7e0607e2/166291545/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc2_f&source=em_20161221_dnc2_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c28a/4067b0a/22c9391c2/7e0607e3/166291545/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161221_dnc2_f&source=em_20161221_dnc2_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Allison Tant
subject: this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| Friend --

As the holiday season begins, I want to take a moment to wish you a happy, healthy, and safe holiday season from all of us here at the Florida Democratic Party.

Like us, we hope you can enjoy time with loved ones, have a chance to relax, and look ahead to the New Year. Your support has meant so much to us this year, and we're thankful to have you on our side.

All the best, and Happy Holidays,

Allison

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3c1/1a5213b3/75aafd01/718bc7f4/3010560206/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NWFhZmQwMSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiM2MxIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/75aafd01/77b4b3c1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+here&utm_campaign=em122116&source=em122116") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Marcy Stech, EMILY's List
subject: Anti-choice Republicans can't fool us
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef6062/1918260257/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all")
---

Peter,

Ohio Governor John Kasich is trying to pull a fast one.

He recently vetoed a bill that would ban abortion after six weeks -- but then immediately signed a 20-week abortion ban into law in an attempt to seem moderate.

But women aren't fooled. We know exactly what this is: political meddling in our lives and our choices.

We can fight back and show Kasich and other anti-woman Republicans that we know what's up.

**[Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women to stand up to anti-choice Republicans like John Kasich.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef6063/1918260257/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161221_email_Ohio?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+more+prochoice+De&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all")**

Both bans are in direct conflict with _Roe v. Wade_. They are unconstitutional. Kasich and other anti-choice Republicans are just hoping the Supreme Court will become more anti-choice after some Trump nominations and more willing to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

It's time we stopped these bills at the beginning -- before they're taken to court, before they're signed into law by anti-choice governors, before they're even introduced. And to do that, we need to elect a wave of pro-choice Democratic women at the state and local level.

EMILY's List is planning to prioritize Ohio and other key states in 2018. But we need to know if this community is invested in winning the down-ballot races where Republicans have dominated since 2010.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot and show that we will defend choice wherever it is under attack:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/We-Arent-Fooled](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef609c/1918260257/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161221_email_Ohio?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWeArentFooled&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all")**

Thank you,

Marcy Stech
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef609d/1918260257/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161221_email_Ohio?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef609e/1918260257/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef609f/1918260257/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77d4/24c69fd9/ff5a58a7/18ef6098/1918260257/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all&source=WPEFEX25N_digital_email_20161221_Ohio_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.
